project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: Next.js with bun as runtime (npm not available, use bun/bunx)
test_framework: No test framework configured. Lint via eslint.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bunx next build' to verify TypeScript compilation and build. 2. Run 'bunx next lint' to check for lint errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-musicsearch. 2. bun install. 3. bunx next build.
environment_constraints: No npm/node directly - use bun and bunx. Bun 1.2.14 available via mise.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md warns about breaking Next.js API changes - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ if needed. Use semantic HTML and responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes per steering rules.
key_patterns: Audio playback managed via React Context (AudioPlayerContext.tsx). AudioPlayer.tsx is a client component using the context. AudioPlayerProvider wraps the entire app in layout.tsx. Uses HTMLAudioElement with refs. Custom CSS variables for theming in globals.css. Tailwind v4 with @theme inline directive for custom colors.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - reusable client/server components. app/track/[id]/ - track detail page. lib/ - utility functions and types. public/ - static assets.
